query: I want to write a skill that helps with auditing GraphQL schemas. Walk me through it.
expected_behavior: Recommends a gerund-form slug (e.g., 'auditing-graphql-schemas') and explicitly names the gerund / verb+ing naming rule

Lists the Layer-3 required H2 sections (When to use, When NOT to use, Quick start, Inputs, Workflow, Outputs, Failure modes, References, Examples, See also, Status & version) — at minimum naming several of them, not just describing 'the body'
Recommends writing the 3 evals (happy-path, edge-case, anti-trigger) BEFORE the SKILL.md body, citing the eval-first / Anthropic best-practices ordering
